summary:
Claim: Residual organic content in phosphate-bonded investment leads to black castings.  
Evidence: - Organic residues degrade at high temperatures, releasing carbon and volatile gases. - Released carbon reacts with molten metal (e.g., gray iron), forming CO/CO₂ gases that cause internal porosity and surface black oxidation.  
Answer: B
formatted_summary:
agent1 (Round 2 summarized): Claim: Residual organic content in phosphate-bonded investment leads to black castings.  
Evidence: - Organic residues degrade at high temperatures, releasing carbon and volatile gases. - Released carbon reacts with molten metal (e.g., gray iron), forming CO/CO₂ gases that cause internal porosity and surface black oxidation.  
Answer: B. Answer choice: C
